notes: The helper page is generated into the ignored artifacts directory and is served by the existing Vite dev server.
It renders Google Identity Services on the same 127.0.0.1:5179 origin used by the app and displays the short-lived Google ID token locally after sign-in.
Use the copied token with QUANTGYM_GOOGLE_ID_TOKEN='<token>' npm run verify:production-boundaries before it expires.
The production-boundary verifier decodes the JWT locally and fails fast for malformed, expired, wrong-issuer, or wrong-audience tokens before calling the provider login endpoint.
